S

select(String, String, String, String, String) - Method in class DBHelper.regulars
Executes a SELECT query on the regulars table and returns the results as an ArrayList.
selectToTable(String, String, String, String, String) - Method in class DBHelper.regulars
Returns results as a default table method.
start(Stage) - Method in class BarRegularGUI
This is the starting stage where I set the grid for the main menu of the DMS.
